---
title: "What Books to Lend and What to Give.  By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘The Heir of Redclyffe’ ‘Cameos from English History’ etc.,"
---

## What Books to Lend and What to Give.  By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘The Heir of Redclyffe’ ‘Cameos from English History’ etc.,

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1887
**Genre:** Non-fiction: advice to charity workers
**Format:** Pamphlet, 126pp

**Publisher:** London: National Society’s Depository, Sanctuary, Westminster.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
